name: Stir-Fried Lamb with Mint and Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Lean lamb, cut into fine strips
1 tablespoon Finely sliced red chili pepper
5 tablespoons Fresh mint leaves, sliced (if large)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok and stir-fry the lamb for several minutes until almost cooked.
2. Add the garlic, oyster sauce, Nuoc Mam sauce, sugar, and chili and stir-fry for another 2 minutes or so.
3. Taste to see if extra seasoning is necessary and adjust.
4. When the meat is cooked and tender, stir the mint leaves through and serve on a dish.
